daily.today_energy: Your mind's running at light speed today, Gemini. Channel that electric restlessness into something creative—your vibe is magnetic and people are picking up what you're putting down.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your playful energy is *chef's kiss* for connection. Single? That witty charm of yours is basically a siren call. Don't overthink the flirtation—just vibe.
daily.career: Your communication skills are leveling up. This is your moment to pitch ideas, speak up in meetings, or reach out to that person you've been meaning to contact. momentum is real.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit overstimulated—ground yourself with something tactile. A walk, some tea, journaling. Your body's asking you to slow down just a little bit.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. Your mind is sharper than usual, but don't forget to actually listen instead of just waiting to talk. There's magic in the pauses.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. If you're in something, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Stop overthinking and let yourself be a little messy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are genuinely good this week—the kind that make people go 'wait, actually.' Channel that into projects that matter to you. Collaboration flows better than going solo.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Lean into grounding stuff: walks, tea, touch grass literally. Your body's asking you to slow down and you should probably listen.
